message:
fix: clean up Codex hooks dead code and add missing test coverage

Remove dead if/return branch in outputSessionMetadata where both paths
did the same thing (formatting logic lives in formatSessionMetadataLine).
Add test verifying primeStructuredSessionStartOutput stays false for
non-SessionStart hook events like Stop.

Follows fix-merge of PR #2683.
